## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check:oss-safety`

## Security

- [ ] No real API keys, bearer tokens, local databases, logs, or private prompts are included.
- [ ] New examples use environment variable placeholders instead of inline credentials.
